roa.docketEntryComment: ACCT SETUP IN CUBS,REFER ALL FINES AND FEES TO COLLECTIONS UNIT

/CAL DA MTR FILING/X PUBLIC DEFENDER DECLARED A CONFLICT/CON FRANZ FUETSCH/X DA MTR FILED/CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S12 /TBH 11018603/PROB ADM REV/**/OR/CTORD OR TO SPR, DEFENDANT TO PARTICIPATE IN DRUG PROGRAM IF NEEEDEDREPORT OT SPR IN PERSON 5 TIMES PER WEEK, NO NEW OFFENSES, APPEAR ON 07-15-11, MUST BE A POSITIVE REPORT OR DEFENDANT WILL BE REMANDED INTO CUSTODY/

/TWS/CH1 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y  PJ 90D/CTS 19/VF1/PGM10 RESIDENTIAL PROGRAMWALDEN HOUSE (6 MONTH PROGRAM)/X:IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLETE THE 6 MONTH PROGRAM AT WALDEN HOUSE SHE RECEIVES NO CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED FROM THE PROGRAM,/X: THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANT IS ELIGIBLE FOR CONDUCT CREDITS PURSUANT TO PC 4019 (B)(1),/  /MPROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/COLLECT/CTORD:DEFENDANT NOT TO POSSESS ANY IDENTIFYING INFORMATION BELONGING TO ANY OTHER PERSON/SA2:STAY OUT OF MARRIOTT HOTEL AT 55 4TH ST, SF/SAORD/X:RESTITUTIONTO BE DETERMINED BY PTD/DISM3/CONTD:PTD REPORT RE RESTITUTION/DOP/OBEY/ACCEP/OR/
/CAL:COUNSEL & SPR/STWPX/X:ORDER FOR RELEASE OF JAIL INMATE FOR TRANSPORTATION TO A RESIDENTIAL SUBSTANCE ABUSE TREATMENT CENTER, SIGNED BY JUDGE LITTLE, IS FILED/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO & COUNSEL/DOP/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/BAIL:20,000/CONTD SPR ELIG REPORT, DOP/CONTD:FOR SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT DUE IN DEPT 9 ON 12-02-09 (FOR RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM)/
/CTORD:PROBATION IN # 2446420 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
/CAL:DA MTR, TRAILING 10036448/X:THE MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION IS WITHDRAWN BY THE PEOPLE/REIN ORIG TC/PROB TERM:02-23-13/BE/
/CAL: TS DA MTR/CONTD: 04-26-11 TRAILING 10036448 IN DEPT 26/CONTD: 05-27-11 TRAILING 10036448 IN DEPT 22/DOP/
CONTD TS DA MTR/WIAMTR/S09/TBH:10036448)/PROB ADM REV/SHER/BAIL:1000/
/CAL:PTD PROG RE RESTITUTION/DEF:OWES A CURRENT BALANCE OF $272, ORIGINALBALANCE WAS $291/REST:272/RESTO:MARRIOTT HOTEL AT 55 4TH ST, SF/COLLECT/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/MO PC 17B/MO GRTD/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZRTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
